commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed because the primary blocker is Windows platform/release/security ownership, with narrow code fixes after that decision.; Needs attention: The security pass found a concrete mutable-script execution issue and an external secret-history follow-up, in a PR that also adds OAuth/Credential Manager and installer surfaces.; Review finding: [P1] Pin the downloaded dotnet installer —... (sha=defa73be3a64cba4e74117656d2763b9d8f92b38)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a native .NET/WinForms Windows tray companion plus Windows docs, package/smoke/Crabbox scripts, tests, installer metadata, and CI coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a bug report. The PR body does provide high-signal Crabbox build/test/smoke proof for the new Windows tray path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed because the primary blocker is Windows platform/release/security ownership, with narrow code fixes after that decision.

target.title: feat(windows): add taskbar tray companion
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a native Windows taskbar tray companion under `Windows/` with rich repository status rows, local git state, recent GitHub lists with issue label and PR filters, scoped global Commits and Activity feeds, traffic/repository heatmap/changelog summaries, configurable repository heatmap placement/window controls, account contribution totals with a compact heatmap preview, Actions queue/billing/cache/runner details, REST/GraphQL rate-limit bucket diagnostics, configurable PR notification events, including closed/reopened/merged state changes, with duplicate suppression, About, Issue Navigator browser preview/copy/open actions, optional clipboard reference monitoring, preferences, named account profiles, fork/archive-filtered repository discovery, visibility controls, owner/status display filters, repository move controls, repository display limit/sort/scope controls, and main/repository menu customization, local branch switching, worktree creation/navigation, optional dirty file menu entries, configurable local fetch cadence, preferred terminal actions, repository checkout, GitHub App OAuth, account-scoped Credential Manager token storage, tray logout, ETag cache with tray cache reset, archive-backed issue/PR fallback, launch-at-login, update checks with Windows installer asset detection and copyable update diagnostics, and installer packaging.
- Add Windows build/package/smoke/Crabbox scripts, including TRX test artifacts, smoke JSON artifacts, and best-effort desktop screenshot capture, plus a Windows CI job.
- Document Windows setup and the remaining parity roadmap, including a checked-in Windows tray screenshot proof at `docs/assets/repobar-windows-tray-menu.png`.

## Validation
- `CRABBOX_PROVIDER=aws CRABBOX_TARGET=windows pnpm windows:crabbox`
- Crabbox run `run_26899dda3621`: validated the Windows tray My repositories owner-filter toggle on Windows Server 10.0.20348 with .NET SDK 8.0.421; `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 131 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, including owner-filter toggle semantics, normalized persisted owner filters, and menu customization coverage. `smoke_windows.ps1` also published/launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, wrote `dist/windows/smoke/repobar-windows-smoke-20260606T135027Z.json`, and logged `processRunning=True`, `settingsCreated=True`, `sampleRepository=steipete/RepoBar`, `localRepositoryCount=1`, `localGitStatusAttached=True`, `archiveFallbackIssue=True`, `archiveFallbackPullRequest=True`, `workAccountActive=True`, `workCredentialTargetsScoped=True`, `accountSwitcher=True`, `cacheReset=True`, `repositoryScope=True`, `repositorySort=True`, `myRepositories=True`, `diagnostics=True`, `about=True`, `diagnosticsCapture=True`, `logVerbosity=True`, `fileLogging=True`, `localFetchInterval=True`, and `updateDiagnostics=True`. Desktop screenshot capture was attempted but reported unavailable in the SSH runner (`CopyFromScreen`: invalid handle).
- Crabbox run `run_7aca5272f4e7`: validated compact Windows tray tooltip rate-limit state on Windows Server 10.0.20348 with .NET SDK 8.0.421; `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 128 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, including tooltip truncation and rate-limit display coverage. `smoke_windows.ps1` also published/launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, wrote `dist/windows/smoke/repobar-windows-smoke-20260606T134105Z.json`, and logged `processRunning=True`, `settingsCreated=True`, `sampleRepository=steipete/RepoBar`, `localRepositoryCount=1`, `localGitStatusAttached=True`, `archiveFallbackIssue=True`, `archiveFallbackPullRequest=True`, `workAccountActive=True`, `workCredentialTargetsScoped=True`, `accountSwitcher=True`, `cacheReset=True`, `repositoryScope=True`, `repositorySort=True`, `diagnostics=True`, `about=True`, `diagnosticsCapture=True`, `logVerbosity=True`, `fileLogging=True`, `localFetchInterval=True`, and `updateDiagnostics=True`. ## Notes
- This is a draft because Windows is now end-to-end build/test/smoke validated for the implemented tray surface, OAuth, account profiles, rich repository rows, scoped global Commits and Activity feeds, filtered recent issue label and PR submenus, fork/archive-filtered repository discovery, owner/status display filters, repository display limit/sort/scope controls, repository heatmap placement/window controls, main/repository menu customization, local branch switching, worktree creation/navigation, optional dirty file menu entries, configurable local fetch cadence, preferred terminal actions, repository checkout, archive-backed issue/PR fallback, combined GitHub/local status coverage, account heatmap summary, Actions queue/billing/cache/runner details, REST/GraphQL rate-limit bucket diagnostics, Issue Navigator preview and clipboard reference monitoring, configurable PR notification events/click handling, closed/reopened/merged state changes, duplicate suppression, update-check installer asset detection, copyable update diagnostics, tray logout, and desktop tray/menu proof, but not true full macOS feature parity yet.
- The SSH smoke still cannot take an in-process WinForms screenshot on the Crabbox image; the durable UI proof uses Crabbox's VNC framebuffer capture instead, which is the correct layer for interactive desktop evidence.
